before_problem: Multiple dense line breaks across important terms: selected material-effect, ConvertAsset, PreviewSurface, and official KuJiaLe.
The paragraph listed experiment artifacts instead of presenting the clean/stress/material/navigation evidence as one bounded gate chain.
accepted_residual: The final page still has the mild break 'broad ro- / bustness'. It was accepted for this round because further shortening destabilized the contribution block or introduced worse breaks.

change_summary.summary: Reframed the GRScenes clean/stress pools, material audit, and KuJiaLe InternNav run under shared gate logic while preserving the bounded-claim language.

observations: The contact sheet remains 11 pages with no blank page or obvious figure/table collision.
The page-2 before/after crop shows the old material-effect, ConvertAsset, PreviewSurface, and KuJiaLe break cluster removed.
Contribution item flow and the Related Work start remain visually stable after the paragraph rewrite.

verification.command: bash -lc 'if rg -n "Overfull|LaTeX Warning: Label|There were undefined references|Undefined control sequence|multiply-defined|Rerun to get cross-references right|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log; then exit 1; else printf "no blocker matches\n"; fi'

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract word count 169
